title: solanum batatas
intro: Solanum batatas, also known as the yam bean or jicama, is a perennial vine plant that belongs to the Solanum genus. The plant's tubers contain solanine, a compound with medicinal properties that can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The tubers of Solanum batatas have been reported to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss. In herbal preparations, the tubers are often dried and used as a tea or decoction, or they can be cooked and consumed as a starchy vegetable.
